title: Standardize Hover/Transition Behavior
description: 235 transition values tokenized to var(--transition-fast/normal/slow). scale() hover effects in MC replaced with translateY(-2px). All CSS transitions now use unified tokens (150-250ms ease-in-out).

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
